assertions.title: README uses VIRTUAL_HOST instead of YPM_HOST

steps.expected: Multiple matches in env var section, deployment instructions, and routing description
steps.observed: 5 matches: line 32 (VIRTUAL_HOST=localhost env default), line 50 (deployment instructions: set VIRTUAL_HOST in .env), lines 52-53 (frontend UI and Swagger URLs using VIRTUAL_HOST), line 260 (Traefik routing scoped to VIRTUAL_HOST), line 270 (deploy script polls /health on VIRTUAL_HOST)

evidence.grepVIRTUAL_HOST: 5 matches at lines 32, 50, 52, 53, 260, 270 — covering env block, deployment instructions, and Traefik routing description

steps.observed: 1 match at line 24: '- `ypricemagic-server` routes are scoped by `VIRTUAL_HOST`.'

steps.expected: All tests pass including 'does not save identity pairs' and 'falls back to default pair when stored custom pair is an identity pair'
steps.observed: 78 tests passed across 3 test files. Both specific identity-pair tests found and passing: tokenlist.test.ts line 327 'does not save identity pairs' (saveCustomPair rejects from===to) and line 387 'falls back to default pair when stored custom pair is an identity pair' (getEffectivePair ignores identity pairs)

evidence.testOutput: 3 test files passed (utils.test.ts: 22 tests, api.test.ts: 12 tests, tokenlist.test.ts: 44 tests). Total: 78 tests passed, 0 failed.
specificTests: tokenlist.test.ts:327 - 'does not save identity pairs' — saveCustomPair('arbitrum', '0xABCDEF', '0xabcdef') is rejected (case-insensitive same address)
tokenlist.test.ts:387 - 'falls back to default pair when stored custom pair is an identity pair' — getEffectivePair returns DEFAULT_PAIRS when stored pair has from===to

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-DOC-001: README.md has 0 YPM_HOST references and 5 VIRTUAL_HOST references in correct sections. VAL-DOC-002: traefik-proxy/README.md has 0 YPM_HOST references. VAL-BUG-002: All 78 frontend unit tests pass, including specific tests for saveCustomPair rejecting identity pairs and getEffectivePair falling back to defaults for identity pairs.
